home.heroSubtitle: Bold, tactile, one-of-a-kind pieces — crocheted with courage and delight.
home.story: Every Lilymade piece is crocheted by hand in Italy. No two are exactly alike.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.shippingNote: Shipping calculated at checkout. Free over €100.

account.title: Account
account.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

order.successMsg: Your payment was successful. A confirmation has been sent to your email.
order.cancelMsg: Your order was not completed. Your cart is still saved.

about.title: About Lilymade
about.body: Lilymade is a small Italian studio making crochet bags entirely by hand. Each piece is worked stitch by stitch, inspired by colour, texture and a love of bold, joyful design. Because everything is handmade, most pieces are one-of-a-kind.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Questions about a bag, a custom order, or shipping? Reach us by email and we'll get back to you soon.

policies.title: Shipping & Returns
policies.shippingBody: Orders ship from Italy. Standard shipping is a flat rate, and shipping is free on orders over €100.
policies.returnsBody: As pieces are handmade, please contact us within 14 days of delivery to arrange a return or exchange.
